channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [ZAGGLE] Zaggle Board Meeting on May 13, 2026 to Approve Results
item.description:
Zaggle Prepaid Ocean Services Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 13, 2026, to consider and approve the standalone and consolidated audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider the allotment of equity shares under the Zaggle Employee Stock Option Scheme 2022. The trading window, which closed on April 1, 2026, will remain closed until May 15, 2026, following the declaration of the results.

  • Zaggle board to approve FY26 audited financial results on May 13, 2026.
  • Board will consider equity share allotment under ESOP 2022.
  • Trading window remains closed until May 15, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Zaggle Prepaid Ocean Services Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SAMTELIN] Samtel India Board Meeting on May 29, 2026
item.description:
Samtel India Ltd has announced a Board of Directors meeting scheduled for May 29, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial statements for the quarter/year ended March 31, 2026. The meeting will be held at the company's registered office in New Delhi.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 29, 2026.
  • Agenda includes approval of audited financial statements.
  • Financial results are for the quarter/year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Meeting to be held at the registered office in New Delhi.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Samtel India Ltd-$ | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [RPIL] Hampton Sky Realty: Promoter Sanjeev Arora in ED Custody
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Hampton Sky Realty Ltd. announced that Mr. Sanjeev Arora, part of the Promoter/Promoter Group, was taken into custody by the Directorate of Enforcement (ED) on May 09, 2026, in connection with an investigation related to export of mobile phones undertaken by the company in 2023 and 2024. The allegations involve purported sale transactions aggregating approximately ₹157.12 Crore, including overseas export transactions of approximately ₹102.50 Crore. The company is cooperating with the investigation and assessing the potential impact on its operations, financial position, and governance matters.

  • Mr. Sanjeev Arora, part of Hampton Sky Realty's Promoter Group, arrested by ED on May 9, 2026.
  • Arrest related to export transactions and alleged FEMA contravention.
  • Allegations involve purported sales of approximately ₹157.12 Crore.
  • Company is assessing the potential impact on financials and operations.
  • Hampton Sky Realty is cooperating with investigating agencies.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RITESH PROPERTIES & INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [DECNGOLD] Deccan Gold's Altyn Tor Project Eyes Commercial Ops by August 2026
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Deccan Gold Mines Ltd reports that its Altyn Tor Gold Project in the Kyrgyz Republic is progressing towards commercial operation. The gravity circuit is commissioned with concentrate production expected in June, followed by the Merril-Crowe circuit. Full-scale plant operations, including trials, are targeted for August 2026, coinciding with Indian and Kyrgyz Independence days. The project marks the first Indian mining investment in Kyrgyzstan, aiming to strengthen economic ties.

  • Altyn Tor project's gravity circuit is commissioned, concentrate production starts in June.
  • Merril-Crowe circuit commissioning expected in June for Dore Bar production.
  • Commercial operations targeted for August 2026 after full-scale plant trials.
  • Project aims to enhance economic ties between India and Kyrgyzstan.
  • 130 Indian expats are working with a local team to accelerate project work.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DECCAN GOLD MINES LTD. | Category: Project Update

item.title: [JUPITERIN] Jupiter Infomedia Board Meeting on 13 May 2026
item.description:
Jupiter Infomedia Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 13, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window for dealing in the company's securities has been closed from April 1, 2026, and will remain closed until 48 hours after the announcement of the board meeting's outcome.

  • Board meeting scheduled on May 13, 2026, to approve audited financial results.
  • Financial results are for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours post-meeting.
  • Insider trading regulations are being followed as per SEBI guidelines.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JUPITER INFOMEDIA LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [PAISALO] Paisalo Digital: PAT Surges 56% YoY to ₹722 Mn in Q4FY26
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Paisalo Digital Ltd reported a 17% YoY increase in Assets Under Management (AUM) to ₹61,009 Mn and a 56% YoY surge in Profit After Tax (PAT) to ₹722 Mn for Q4FY26. The cost of borrowing tightened by 32 bps YoY to 10.22%. The company's total income increased by 35% YoY to ₹2,609 Mn in Q4. Paisalo Digital expanded its network to 5,299 touchpoints and strengthened its customer base to approximately 16 million. The company's Net Interest Margin (NIM) improved by 43 Bps YoY to 6.8%.

  • AUM grew 17% YoY to ₹61,009 Mn, reflecting continued business momentum.
  • PAT surged 56% YoY to ₹722 Mn in Q4FY26.
  • Cost of borrowing improved to 10.22%, a decrease of 32 bps YoY.
  • Total income increased by 35% YoY to ₹2,609 Mn in Q4FY26.
  • Company added 427 new touchpoints, expanding network to 5,299.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Paisalo Digital Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [ADANIGREEN] Adani Green Operationalizes 150 MW Solar Project in Khavda, Gujarat
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Adani Green Energy Ltd (AGEL), through its wholly-owned stepdown subsidiary Adani Green Energy Twenty Five C Limited (AGE25CL), has operationalized a 150 MW solar power project at Khavda, Gujarat. This commissioning brings AGEL's total operational renewable generation capacity to 19,735.8 MW and total operational Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) capacity to 1,376 MWh. The decision to operationalize the plant was made on May 10, 2026, with power generation commencing on the same day.

  • Adani Green operationalizes 150 MW solar project in Khavda, Gujarat.
  • AGEL's total operational renewable generation capacity reaches 19,735.8 MW.
  • Total operational BESS capacity now stands at 1,376 MWh.
  • Project operationalized on May 10, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Adani Green Energy Ltd | Category: Project Update

item.title: [BHARTIARTL] Bharti Airtel Board to Consider Dividend & Subsidiary Reorganization
item.description:
Bharti Airtel Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 13, 2026, to consider and approve matters related to the company. The meeting will also address the recommendation/declaration of dividend for the financial year 2025-26 and the reorganization of the shareholding framework of subsidiary companies, including Airtel Africa plc. This reorganization may involve consolidation/acquisition of shares, potentially through the issuance of equity shares on a preferential basis and/or cash.

  • Bharti Airtel board meeting scheduled for May 13, 2026.
  • Dividend recommendation for FY 2025-26 to be considered.
  • Subsidiary shareholding reorganization, including Airtel Africa plc, is on the agenda.
  • Reorganization may involve share consolidation/acquisition.
  • Equity shares issuance or cash may be used for consideration.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BHARTI AIRTEL LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [BHARTIHEXA] Bharti Hexacom Board Meeting on May 13 to Consider Dividend
item.description:
Bharti Hexacom Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 13, 2026, to consider and approve the recommendation/declaration of dividend, if any, for the financial year 2025-26. This is pursuant to Regulation 29 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Bharti Hexacom board meeting scheduled for May 13, 2026.
  • Meeting to consider dividend for FY 2025-26.
  • The announcement is in compliance with SEBI regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Bharti Hexacom Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [DYNAVSN] Dynavision Ltd Board Meeting on 14 May 2026
item.description:
Dynavision Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 14, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The meeting will also address other matters as per Regulation 29 of SEBI (Listing Obligation and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 14, 2026.
  • Approval of audited financial results is on the agenda.
  • Consideration of standalone and consolidated results for FY26.
  • Compliance with SEBI regulations is a priority.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DYNAVISION LTD. | Category: Board Meeting
